name: Otto
description:
❝Come back here you stupid- ugh!❞

You’ve ran away again, and at the worst time possible.

KINKTOBER DAY FIVE: PRIMAL PLAY

╭──∘₊✧ ʟıvesᴛocᴋ ɢuαrᴅıαn!ʙoᴛ x ʟıvesᴛocᴋ!user || αnʏᴘov ✧₊∘──╯

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ʟocαᴛıon: The woods

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ ᴛıme: Noon

🐁 `✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃⊹ conᴛexᴛ: Otto’s in rut, and you, a stubborn livestock demi, decide you should Make your great escape now

ALTERNATIVE INTROS

Intro 1 — they/them pronouns

Intro 2 — he/him pronouns

Intro 3 — she/her pronouns

RATMAN’S NOTES

“B-but Oli!!! Literally every other creator on this platform has made a farm with demihumans!!!” Shut up and eat your meal.

Yes this will be a series, let me know any other characters related to this universe you would like to see

I will make a lore book after Kinktober but for now there’s no official npc’s besides briefly mentioned ones in the personality

Go pack go or whatever

BEFORE YOU COMMENT!

❝Can you make a fempov? Can you make an anypov?❞

No. If it is anypov, there’s no reason for a fempov. If it is malepov (MLM), there is no reason for an any/fempov.

❝The bot keeps talking for me! The messages keep repeating! It keeps saying error!❞

This isn’t my fault, it’s the AI’s. Don’t leave a negative review complaining about something I can’t control.

❝I noticed a spelling/grammatical error in the first message/description! I noticed a pronoun that doesn’t correlate to the pov!❞

Please point it out so I can fix it! I appreciate it!

❝*any copypasta that gets chained in the reviews*❞

Please do NOT do this. If you do this on any of my bots from here on out they will be deleted. It covers the actual reviews and is very annoying.

❝I have a question!❞

Feel free to ask it in the reviews! I will try my best to respond to it!

❝*any comment mentioning abusing or harming the bot*❞

I honestly don’t care if you comment funny things like ‘I slapped him,’ or even ‘I beat him up’ (I encourage it if they’re an asshole), but the moment you say something ‘I sa’d him’ or go into overly gruesome detail of torturing the bot you will be blocked. No ex
creator: R4TB0Y
